title: ClickThroug
description: Open chests through signs and frames effortlessly.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

ClickThrough lets you open containers even when they’re covered by signs or item frames. Instead of editing the sign or rotating the frame, a simple right-click passes straight through and opens the chest, barrel, shulker box, or any other container behind it. The mod works entirely on the client, meaning it requires no installation on servers and is fully compatible with any modpack. Sneaking preserves vanilla behavior, allowing you to edit signs or rotate frames normally. Clean, seamless, and incredibly convenient for storage systems or decorative builds.
